medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Mr. ___ is a ___ with a history of DM2, HTN, and hepatitis C cirrhosis s/p orthotopic liver transplant in ___ with a Roux-en-Y hepaticojejunostomy, complicated by acute cellular rejection, CMV viremia and leukopenia, severe osteoporosis, and recurrent hepatitis C with fibrosing cholestatic hepatitis. He was admitted for further evaluation of anemia, renal failure, and elevated LFTs.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Cirrhosis, s/p TIPS placement ___, s/p OLT ___ with recurrent hepatitis C ___ and acute cellular rejection ___, now with fibrosing cholestatic hepatitis. CMV viremia. Nonresponder to interferon and ribavirin after six months of therapy in ___. Treated with pegylated interferon and ribavirin for six months, treatment was discontinued for unclear reasons. Chronic Renal Insufficiency. Depression. Osteoarthritis. Hip osteopenia. Right knee surgery. Bilateral hernia repair. s/p Umbilical hernia repair. HTN. DM II.
medical_history.family_history: 5 siblings. Some with thyroid and arthritis problems. No FHx liver or kidney disease.

physical_examination.general_examination: VS: T97.8 BP149/97 P61 Sat100RA RR20. Thin appearing male, frail but in NAD.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Neurological: AAOx3, CN2-12 intact bilaterally. Cardiovascular: RRR, S1 S2 clear and of good quality without murmurs, rubs or gallops. Lungs: bibasilar crackles appreciated. Abdomen: SNT ND, +BS, well healed surgical scars.
